title: ourisia remotifolia
intro: Ourisia remotifolia, also known as the New Zealand forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ourisia remotifolia include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
